untranslatable_reason: Signal requires implied volatility percentile (IV_PERCENTILE), expected absolute price move forecasting, and psychological management rules which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators. IV percentile, directional catalyst detection, and volatility expansion signals are not available in the indicator set. The context-dependent long/short selection logic based on market regime expectations also exceeds the scope of technical indicator combinations.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using hvol_20 as proxy for volatility regime and atr_14 vs hvol_20 comparison as proxy for expected move analysis. Entry_short condition intentionally left incomplete as it represents the ranging market scenario (close near strike) which requires IV percentile data to properly execute. Exit conditions use returns as proxy for profit targets, but exact thresholds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are unspecified in source material.
